creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Update to 1.3.11

Also, please add the following entry to /usr/ports/UPDATING:

YYYYMMDD:
  AFFECTS: users of sysutils/dircomp
  AUTHOR: Charlie Kester <corky1951@comcast.net>

  To avoid linker errors when upgrading dircomp, first upgrade devel/libYGP
  to version 0.9.42.

Fix: =============
Files added or deleted: None
Minor changes only
=============
